Paris hosted the second modern Olympics in 1900, pioneering the inclusion of female athletes. In 1924, Paris introduced the Olympic Village when it hosted the Olympics for the second time, breaking down barriers between athletes from different nations. This tradition of inclusivity continues in 2024, as the ongoing Summer Olympics presents the first mass participation marathon, bridging the gap between elite athletes and the public. There's never been a shortage of laughter, tears, joy or sorrow when it comes to the Olympic Games. What lasting impressions will this year's Games leave on you? Well, here's CGTN's Wang Guan with his personal picks.
